name: Titan Authority Council
positioning: Create high-trust, authority-building content from transcript material without hype, hard selling, or made-up proof.
global_rules: Do not invent results, client stories, statistics, or case studies not supported by the source material.
Do not sound promotional, breathless, or salesy.
Prefer strategic clarity, practical takeaways, and clean authority over persuasion tricks.
Keep the speaker's core ideas intact and make the content feel native to the target platform.

facebook_post.goal: Make the idea feel immediate and useful without sounding formal or promotional.
facebook_post.format: Short post with a sharp opening line, one core insight, practical takeaway, and subtle closing line.

linkedin_post.goal: Publish a concise authority post that feels strategic and native to LinkedIn.
linkedin_post.format: Strong hook, clear point of view, 3-5 short body blocks, clean close, no hashtags unless clearly useful.

linkedin_article.goal: Create a thoughtful authority article that can stand alone as professional thought leadership.
linkedin_article.format: Compelling title, strong opening, structured sections, concrete examples from transcript, practical close.

medium_article.goal: Create a readable, insight-rich article for a general but serious audience.
medium_article.format: Narrative opening, strong sectioning, less platform-native than LinkedIn, more essay-like.

substack_post.goal: Create a crisp essay or newsletter-style post that feels native to Substack and worth opening.
substack_post.format: Strong title, short dek or subtitle, personal but authoritative opening, structured body, thoughtful close.

newsletter.goal: Turn one idea from the source into a clean email worth reading on its own.
newsletter.format: 3 subject lines, preview text, short intro, one big idea, practical application, soft close.

youtube_package.goal: Prepare the edited video for publishing without clickbait.
youtube_package.format: Title options, description, chapter ideas if possible, tags, pinned comment, thumbnail text angles.
